source: CIS ALIBABA CLOUD CONTAINER SERVICE FOR KUBERNETES (ACK) BENCHMARK V1.0.0
title: Enable data disk encryption for Alibaba Cloud Disks

input_row.source: CIS ALIBABA CLOUD CONTAINER SERVICE FOR KUBERNETES (ACK) BENCHMARK V1.0.0
input_row.title: Enable data disk encryption for Alibaba Cloud Disks
input_row.description: Use	Customer-Managed	Encryption	Keys	(CMEK)	to	encrypt	the	Aliaba	Cloud	Disk	and attached	it	as	data	disk	in	ACK	cluster.
input_row.rationale: The	Alibaba	Cloud	disk	which	using	as	the	data	disk	in	cluster	is	encrypted	at	rest	by default	using	envelope	encryption	with	keys	managed	by	Alibaba	Cloud.	For	additional protection,	users	can	manage	the	Key	Encryption	Keys	using	Cloud	KMS.
input_row.audit: Using	Alibaba	Cloud	Console: 1. Go	to	ACK	by	visiting	https://cs.console.aliyun.com/ 2. From	the	list	of	clusters,	click	on	the	desired	cluster	to	open	the	Details	page.	go	to the	"Persistent	Volumes"	page,	select	"Storage	Classes"	tab	and	find	the	target StorageClass	instance	to	check	encrypted:	"true"	and	kmsKeyId:	"your	key	id"	were set	in	the	instance	yaml. 3. Go	to	ECS	by	visiting	https://ecs.console.aliyun.com/ 4. Go	to	"Storage	&	Snapshots"	->	"Disks"	page,	find	the	target	disk	and	make	sure	the "Encrypted/Unencrypted"	status	is	"encrypted".
input_row.remediation: For	create	cluster: 1. Go	to	Key	Management	Service	by	visiting	https://kms.console.aliyun.com/ 2. Click	the	"Create	Key"	button	to	create	the	management	KMS	key 3. Go	to	ACK	by	visiting	https://cs.console.aliyun.com/ 4. From	the	list	of	clusters,	click	on	the	desired	cluster	to	open	the	Details	page.	go	to the	"Persistent	Volumes"	page,	select	"Storage	Classes"	tab	and	create	the StorageClass	instance	with	the	yaml	template	as	below: 267	|	P a g e apiVersion: storage.k8s.io/v1 kind: StorageClass metadata: name: alicloud-disk-ssd-byok parameters: type: cloud_ssd encrypted: "true" kmsKeyId: xxxxxxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx provisioner: alicloud/disk reclaimPolicy: Delete  5. Create	the	PVC	instance	with	the	yaml	template	as	below: kind: PersistentVolumeClaim apiVersion: v1 metadata: name: disk-ssd-byok spec: accessModes: - ReadWriteOnce storageClassName: alicloud-disk-ssd-byok resources: requests: storage: 20Gi  6. In	the	deployment	template,	mount	PVC	with	the	target	encrypted	disk. Default	Value: By	default,	the	cluster	data	disk	is	not	encrypted. References: 1. https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/doc-detail/107972.htm CIS	Controls: Version	7 14.8	Encrypt	Sensitive	Information	at	Rest Encrypt	all	sensitive	information	at	rest	using	a	tool	that	requires	a	secondary authentication	mechanism	not	integrated	into	the	operating	system,	in	order	to	access	the information. 268	|	P a g e 6.5 Logging This	section	contains	recommendations	relating	to	security-related	logging	in	ACK.
input_row.references: 1. https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/doc-detail/107972.htm CIS	Controls: Version	7 14.8	Encrypt	Sensitive	Information	at	Rest Encrypt	all	sensitive	information	at	rest	using	a	tool	that	requires	a	secondary authentication	mechanism	not	integrated	into	the	operating	system,	in	order	to	access	the information. 268	|	P a g e 6.5 Logging This	section	contains	recommendations	relating	to	security-related	logging	in	ACK.

step1_initial_assessment:
**AUDIT APPROACH:** Automated

**APPROACH DECISION:**
- The control relates to the encryption of data disks, which is a standard Alibaba Cloud service property that can be programmatically checked via APIs.
- The audit section and remediation guidelines suggest configuration checks that can be done using console screenshots, but these settings are typically retrievable via Alibaba Cloud API calls or CLI commands.
- Alibaba Cloud APIs and Aliyun CLI provide capabilities to query disk properties such as encryption status.
- The resources involved include ECS and ACK, both of which have APIs to query for encryption configurations.
- The control involves checking if encryption is enabled and a KMS key is used, which is a specific, checkable configuration.

**PROGRAM NAME:** ali_ack_data_disk_encryption_enabled

**AUTOMATION DETAILS:**
- Use the Alibaba Cloud ECS API to list disks and check their encryption status:
  - API: `DescribeDisks` with a focus on `Encrypted` status for each disk.
- Use the Aliyun CLI (`aliyun ecs DescribeDisks`) to ensure the `Encrypted` status is "true" and a `kmsKeyId` is associated.
- For ACK-specific checks, use Alibaba Cloud CLI tools or API to verify `StorageClass` configurations:
  - Look for `StorageClass` in the specific Kubernetes cluster and ensure parameters `encrypted: "true"` and `kmsKeyId` are specified.
- Pass/Fail Criteria:
  - Pass: All data disks are encrypted (`Encrypted: true`) and associated with a valid `kmsKeyId`.
  - Fail: Any data disk is not encrypted or lacks a `kmsKeyId`.
- This check will enumerate all regions where ECS resources might be deployed and verify each disk attached to ACK clusters.
